title: calcearia torricellensis
intro: Calcearia torricellensis, also known as Torre's calceolaria, is a flowering plant species in the gentian family (Gentianaceae) that is native to the tropical Andes. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Calcearia torricellensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and combat infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tinctures, infusions, or decoctions, which can be taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
